note: As-is baseline (before): the 0.9.0 TUI cockpit — board.py curses in tmux with v/s/m/g/filter intents + relaunch loop. Architecturally sound (intents + orchestrator execution) but the surface failed in real use: the detached tmux session + manual attach never reached the user; only the chat fallback was usable. Copied into the report bundle from charts/before/ (source: charts/before/current-tui-cockpit.mmd); file path rewritten to the report/before/ location and renamed to the kind name flow.mmd so before/after pair by filename stem in the viewer.

diagrams.title: Before: the 0.9.0 tmux TUI cockpit (surface failed in real use)
